results.rendered_html:
amanas, -amanaska a.
1 Without the organ of desire, thought &c.
2 Devoid of intellect (as a child).
3 Inattentive, careless.
4 Having no control over the mind.
5 Devoid of affection.
— n.
— (naḥ)
1 Not the organ of desire, non-perception.
2 Inattention.
— m. The Supreme Being.
Comp.
— gata a. unknown, unthought of.
— nīta -jña a. disapproved, condemned; reprobate.
— yogaḥ absence of concentration of mind, inattention.
— hara a. displeasing, disagreeable.
